message.content: @startuml actor Administrator participant ":Main UI" as MainUI participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportFileUI participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as Controller participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as GeoList participant "reader:XmlReader" as XmlRdr Administrator ->> Admin : Request file path Admin -->> ImportFileUI : file path activate ImportFileUI note right of ImportFileUI #lightgreen\n#white|Add Readings to Sensors|nAdd readings from XML files into sensors.nThe system reads sensor data by description,nmatches them against existing area-based sensors,\nand updates their values accordingly.|/end note deactivate ImportFileUI importfileui->controller:addreadingtosenors(reader,path) activat controller controler-->xmlrdd:r importreadingsofsensor(path)) actv xmlrdrrd--controll:listofreaddngdto() conroller --> geolist:getallsensors()) geolst - contrller:lisoareasensrs( ) contrll self:setredingbsenordescripton () cotrolle retun numbr lin add t imporfieul impotfilu return number lines added administator @enduml
